metadata.description: Primary references for resilience patterns, failure mode testing, chaos engineering, and production hardening.

reliability_foundations.name: AWS Well-Architected - Reliability Pillar
reliability_foundations.description: Reliability principles, testing, recovery, and failure isolation guidance.

reliability_foundations.name: Google SRE Book - Table of Contents
reliability_foundations.description: Foundational reliability concepts including monitoring, incident response, and release engineering.

reliability_foundations.name: Temporal - Error Handling in Distributed Systems
reliability_foundations.description: Comprehensive guide to resilience patterns in distributed systems (2025).

chaos_engineering.name: Principles of Chaos Engineering
chaos_engineering.description: Core chaos methodology: steady state, hypothesis, experiment design, and safe execution.

chaos_engineering.name: AWS Fault Injection Service (FIS)
chaos_engineering.description: AWS managed chaos engineering service with safety mechanisms and experiment templates.

chaos_engineering.name: Azure Chaos Studio
chaos_engineering.description: Azure managed chaos engineering for resilience testing and validation.

chaos_engineering.name: Chaos Toolkit Documentation
chaos_engineering.description: Open-source chaos engineering framework and experiment definitions.

chaos_engineering.name: Steadybit - Chaos Engineering Best Practices
chaos_engineering.description: Modern chaos engineering experiments and best practices (2025-2026).

patterns_and_specs.name: Martin Fowler - Circuit Breaker
patterns_and_specs.description: Canonical circuit breaker pattern description and intent.

patterns_and_specs.name: Microsoft Azure Architecture - Retry Pattern
patterns_and_specs.description: Retry guidance for transient failures (backoff, jitter, idempotency considerations).

patterns_and_specs.name: Microsoft Azure Architecture - Circuit Breaker Pattern
patterns_and_specs.description: Circuit breaker guidance for preventing cascading failures.

patterns_and_specs.name: Microsoft Azure Architecture - Bulkhead Pattern
patterns_and_specs.description: Bulkhead/isolation guidance to prevent resource exhaustion cascades.

patterns_and_specs.name: Resilience4j Documentation
patterns_and_specs.description: Modern Java resilience library (circuit breaker, rate limiter, retry, bulkhead). Hystrix successor.

kubernetes.name: Kubernetes - Liveness, Readiness, Startup Probes
kubernetes.description: Probe patterns and configuration for resilient deployments.

optional_ai_automation.name: NIST AI Risk Management Framework
optional_ai_automation.description: Optional governance baseline when using AI to generate scenarios or summarize chaos results.
